standaloneReleaseGate.reason: Cambium's release contract is the provider-neutral project archive receipt, not retirement proof for one optional adapter runtime.
requiredEvidence: docs/archive/README.md defines project-closeout as the generic archive contract
bin/archive-ceremony-docs.test.mjs verifies the generic contract and privacy boundary
bin/quine/hyphae/project-evidence.test.ts verifies an archive receipt drives projectArchived evidence

adapterRuntimeRetirement.reason: An agent-plane or other worker-runtime soak is useful operational evidence for that adapter, but a clean standalone Cambium clone must not require that adapter to exist, run, or retire.
adapterRuntimeRetirement.trackedBy: adapter-specific evidence or a follow-up issue when a real adapter migration is in scope

releaseDecision: close the standalone archive blocker once the release-scope manifest and archive tests pass; keep any real adapter retirement as optional adapter evidence outside the product release gate
